description_long: This is a stylized sword featuring a long, straight, double-edged blade with a central ridge running down its length, giving it a robust and symmetrical appearance. The blade is metallic gray, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal, and tapers to a sharp point. The crossguard is wide and angular, colored in a deep blue, and curves slightly downward, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical, also blue, with a textured grip and a faceted pommel at the end, capped with a small golden accent at the guard junction. The overall design is reminiscent of fantasy or legendary swords, with a clean, geometric aesthetic and no visible engravings or embellishments. The sword appears well-balanced and functional, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application.
description: A stylized sword with a straight, double-edged metallic blade, blue angular crossguard, and a textured blue handle with a faceted pommel and gold accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the blade, the wide blue crossguard, and the gold accent at the base of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard and pommel visible as narrow edges.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle details from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: straight, textured blue grip, faceted pommel, cylindrical shape
